title: coreopsis mollicula
intro: Coreopsis mollicula, also known as the woolly coreopsis, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Coreopsis mollicula are said to include relief from fever, digestive issues, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Coreopsis mollicula can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
